content.en:
Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian didn't know how long he had an epiphany, and he didn't even have the concept of time.

He was just guided by an instinctive epiphany, and kept creating the strongest sword skills.

The strongest legendary sword skill!

The strongest god-level sword skill!

The strongest super god-level sword skill!

In the end, Ye Tian finally created the strongest peerless sword technique.

In an instant, Ye Tian's background in sword skills instantly burst out, and countless spiritual lights gushed out, making Ye Tian have a lot of insights and thoughts about the Heavenly Moon Knife of the Sword Dao.

So, Ye Tian perfected the Tianyue Knife.

Many inconsequential concepts and contents were eliminated by Ye Tian one by one, allowing the Tianyue Sword to develop and progress towards the strongest ordinary level sword path peerless learning.

Of course, it is basically unrealistic to make the Tianyue Knife the strongest ordinary-level sword path master at one time.

But this epiphany shortened Ye Tian's time by a lot.

What's more, Ye Tian found the best shortcut to perfect his sword path mastery, which is the biggest benefit!

"It worked!"

Ye Tian retreated from the state of epiphany, so that he had successfully improved the Tianyue Sword Peerless Technique, and had the prototype of the Supreme Sword Dao Peerless Technique, which was regarded as the top one of the ordinary level Sword Dao Peerless Techniques, and the power was much stronger than before.

Immediately, Ye Tian opened his eyes and saw a person.

"Sunday!"

The person standing not far from Ye Tian's eyes was none other than Zhou Tian.

And all around, the corpses of some fierce beasts were scattered everywhere.

Obviously, during the time of Ye Tian's epiphany, some fierce beasts came over, but Zhou Tian killed these fierce beasts one by one in order to protect Ye Tian.

"Senpai!"

Zhou Tian walked over and said respectfully to Ye Tian.

"It's been a month, and you've been guarding me for a month?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, senior, I saw that there was something wrong with my senior's state, and he couldn't hear my inquiry, and he kept standing here still. And occasionally some fierce beasts will come here, worried that these fierce beasts will disturb the seniors, so they are here to protect the seniors!" Zhou Tian explained.

Ye Tian didn't speak, his eyes kept staring at Zhou Tian, and no one knew what he was thinking.

Zhou Tian was very nervous, although Ye Tian had never made a move, but he knew that Ye Tian was definitely an incomparably powerful martial artist.

Because the trace of sword path aura that Ye Tian exuded when he had an epiphany was too powerful, compared to Ye Tian's sword path breath, Zhou Tian felt that he was weaker than I don't know how many times.

The gap between the two is like a sea of kings and a small ditch.

"Do you want to be a strong man?"

Ye Tian asked suddenly.

"Think!" Zhou Tian nodded again and again, but then his eyes dimmed, "Senior, my cultivation talent is very poor, only a second-class cultivation talent, and now I can cultivate to become a martial artist, and I have gone through a lot of hardships. With my cultivation talent, I have no hope of becoming a strong person at all!"

Although his gaze is very dim, he can still see persistence and a faint hope in his gloomy gaze!

"Cultivation talent can be changed, many treasures can improve cultivation talent, if you want, I can improve your cultivation talent!"

Ye Tian promised.

He was willing to help Zhou Tian, but it was not sympathy for Zhou Tian, but an equivalent transaction.

Although Zhou Tian was weak, he watched the scene of Zhou Tian practicing sword skills, which triggered an epiphany and perfected his sword path mastery.

If it weren't for Zhou Tian, he might also be able to comprehend the Supreme Sword Dao Peerless Technique in the future and know how to perfect his Sword Dao Peerless Technique, but it definitely can't be achieved in a short period of time.

It can be said that Zhou Tian saved him many years of practice and took many detours.

If he leaves, he will definitely feel guilty in his heart, so he wants to help Zhou Tian.

"Senior, if you can improve my cultivation talent, Zhou Tian is willing to repay it with a lifetime!"

With a plop, Zhou Tian knelt down and bowed again and again.

Seeing Zhou Tian like this, Ye Tian suddenly had an idea and said, "Are you willing to be my disciple?"

Apprentices!

This was Ye Tian's sudden idea.

Zhou Tian is about to enter the Dao in one step, and with Zhou Tian's talent and amazing understanding in the Dao of Sword, as long as the cultivation talent is improved, the future potential will definitely be extremely terrifying.

Accepting such an apprentice is also a long-faced thing.

Of course, even if Zhou Tian does not rise in the future, doing nothing will have no effect on him.

"Willing, willing, apprentice to meet the master!"

Zhou Tian kowtowed three times in succession and apprenticed to Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian took out a red fruit and handed it to Zhou Tian: "You eat this fruit, it can improve your cultivation talent!"

This fruit does have the effect of improving cultivation talent, but it can only raise a person's cultivation talent to the transcendent level.

Ye Tian naturally couldn't just raise his apprentice to an extraordinary-level cultivation talent, this fruit was just a cover-up.

He was going to use the deprivation of the ability to copy the talent to give Zhou Tianhong-level cultivation talent.

During this period of training, Ye Tianke encountered a lot of evil Tianjiao and god-level powerhouses, these Tianjiao and god-level powerhouses all fell into his hands, and some of them were martial artists with good cultivation talents, he collected their corpses and put them in a certain area of the Void Mina Realm.

Some of these corpses possessed Hong-level cultivation talents, so Ye Tian could deprive Zhou Tian of the Hong-level cultivation talents on the corpses at any time.

"Thank you, Master!"

Zhou Tian swallowed the fruit without hesitation.

When the fruit was in his mouth, a wave of energy entered his body.

And at this moment, Ye Tianci and Zhou Tianhong's cultivation talent.

Rumble!!!

The Hong-level cultivation talent merged with Zhou Tian's second-class cultivation talent, and Zhou Tian's cultivation talent began to transform.

In an instant, Zhou Tian's soul seemed to explode, and the sharp pain almost overwhelmed his consciousness.

"It will be painful to improve your talent, you must endure it!"

Ye Tian's voice entered Zhou Tian's soul.

Zhou Tian heard Ye Tian's reminder, forcibly endured the sharp pain, and turned over on the ground, almost crushing a pair of teeth by him.

If ordinary people almost fainted, but Zhou Tian's will was very strong, far beyond ordinary people, so he successfully endured it.

In the blink of an eye, half an hour passed.

Ye Tian used the copying talent to check Zhou Tian's talent, and seeing that Zhou Tian's talent had changed, he couldn't help but smile slightly.

【Cultivation Talent: Hong Level】

At this time, Zhou Tian's cultivation talent had already become a Hong-level, as long as he didn't fall, Zhou Tian would definitely be able to become a galaxy-level powerhouse in the future.

Moreover, there are countless opportunities in the universe, and Zhou Tiantian may be able to improve his Hong-level cultivation talent even higher on his own.

"Healing talent!"

Ye Tian turned on his healing talent, and his hand emitted a healing light, enveloping Zhou Tian.

Zhou Tian just kept rolling while enduring the fusion talent, leaving his body covered in bruises, and a pair of teeth were almost shattered.

If Ye Tian didn't treat Zhou Tian, he wanted to recover from his injuries with Zhou Tian's own cultivation, and he didn't know how long it would take.

As soon as the light of healing shrouded Zhou Tian, Zhou Tian's injuries recovered almost at a speed that was visible to the naked eye, and even his teeth fell out and grew back.

In the blink of an eye, Zhou Tian's injuries not only recovered, but even the hidden physical hazards caused by his previous forcible cultivation were repaired one by one.

"The body is so relaxed!"

Zhou Tian stood up and moved his body, and was immediately extremely excited.

He felt like he was in better shape than he had ever been, as if he had changed his body.

"Thank you, Master, for treating my injuries!"

Zhou Tian said gratefully.

"It's just a trivial matter, your current cultivation talent has reached the Hong-level cultivation talent, if you keep cultivating, if you keep cultivating, you will be able to cultivate to the galaxy-level level in the future!" Ye Tian said.

"Hong-level cultivation talent?"

When Zhou Tian heard these two names for the first time, he was immediately puzzled.

"Master, what is a Hong-level cultivation talent, and what is galaxy-level?" Zhou Tian asked.

Zhou Tian didn't know the Hong-level cultivation talent, and it was not strange that he didn't know the galaxy level, after all, the strongest person on this planet was only god-level, and this planet had almost no connection with the outside world, and he had never been exposed to advanced cultivation inheritance, so he was simply a martial arts novice.

Ye Tian explained: "Cultivation talents are divided into weak cultivation talents, inferior cultivation talents, elementary cultivation talents, intermediate cultivation talents, advanced cultivation talents, and top-level cultivation talents. On top of the top-level cultivation talents, they are divided into transcendent level, morning level, huiyue level, dawn level, no superior, desolate level, and flood level, and above the hong level, there are also celebrity level and universe level. As for the cultivation level, let's not talk about the low-level, just talk about the grandmaster and above, the king-level, the saint-level, the emperor-level, the god-level, the true god-level, the great god-level, the galaxy-level, the galaxy-level, and even the cosmic god...... You are now a Hong-level cultivation talent, and you can cultivate to the galaxy-level powerhouse level. On this planet, the strongest is only a god-level powerhouse, as long as you work hard, you can easily become the strongest on this planet. You are now my disciple, and your future goal is the sea of stars, not this small planet!"

Sunday was stunned!

The information Ye Tian said completely broke his cognition, and the Hong-level cultivation talent actually surpassed so many levels of second-grade cultivation talent.

Originally, he was just a cultivation wastewood, didn't he suddenly become a cultivation genius who defied the sky?

A god-level powerhouse, he knows it, but that's a legendary figure.

Now a god-level powerhouse seems to be just an ordinary little person in Ye Tian's mouth, with his Hong-level cultivation talent, he can easily surpass the god-level in the future and become that galaxy-level powerhouse high above.

"Shizun easily turned my cultivation talent into a Hong-level cultivation talent, then Shizun must be a powerhouse above the galaxy level!"

Zhou Tian thought to himself.

However, he did think too much, although Ye Tian was the son of the Eternal Universe, his cultivation realm was still at the emperor level.

"Master, can you save my sister?"

Zhou Tian knelt down and pleaded.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded in agreement.

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Then Ye Tian and Zhou Tian returned to the cabin.

As soon as he entered the house, Zhou Tian introduced Ye Tian to his sister.

Zhou Keke learned that Ye Tian was an incomparably powerful martial artist, so he was a little restrained and even nervous.

"I'm starting treatment now!"

Ye Tian used his healing talent and easily treated Zhou Keke's injury.

In just an instant, Zhou Keke's face returned to normal, and the lung injury was completely removed.

"Brother, I'm alright!"

Zhou Keke moved his body and said excitedly.
